title: [ SANCTUM OF BRANCHES ]
subtitle: "Choose your ritual intent, speak the branch name, let the cogitator judge"

priest.label: Digital grandmother priestess of the Machine Spirit
priest.hint: Click her — she'll yell at you

idle.0: Why the hell are you poking me? Type the branch, not me.
idle.1: Push main to prod again and grandma will excommunicate your repo.
idle.2: Stop staring. My cache is full, git child.

preaching.0: Shut up! Litany is running. Don't touch the hologram.
preaching.1: Every slash in your branch is a splinter in my RAM.
preaching.2: Verdict incoming. Hands off, for crying out loud.

blessing.0: Fine, branch is acceptable. Don't get cocky — CI can still fail.
blessing.1: Merge if you must. Just don't screw up review.
blessing.2: The Omnissiah nodded. That doesn't make you a saint.

damning.0: What kind of cursed branch name is that?! Rename it before grandma snaps.
damning.1: Heresy and wip in one package. Have you lost your mind?
damning.2: Deploy to hell. You're coming too if you don't fix this.

busy.0: I'M BUSY, dammit! Wait for the decree!
busy.1: Poke a priestess mid-rite — earn the yelling you deserve.

low_spirit.0: Spirit's at zero and you bother me? Go light candles, fool.
low_spirit.1: Empty altar, yet you offer branches. Bring candles first!

merge.label: Merge rite
merge.description: Seek the Omnissiah's blessing for union with develop

deploy.label: Deploy litany
deploy.description: Ask whether production shall survive your offering

penance.label: Penance path
penance.description: Confess a fix branch and beg absolution from CI

litany.title: Cogitator litany
litany.boot: > INIT BRANCH RITE vΩ.4.2 ... COGITATOR ONLINE
litany.convention_missing: > CONVENTION SIGIL: NOT FOUND — HERESY RISK ELEVATED
litany.kebab: > KEBAB-CASE RUNES: ALIGNED WITH MACHINE LAW

omens.title: Branch omens
omens.sacred_prefix: Sacred conventional prefix guards this branch
omens.spirit_high: Altar spirit burns bright — the Machine Spirit approves
omens.spirit_low: Spirit resonance critical — offer candles before merge
omens.forbidden_mark: Forbidden nomenclature stains the branch sigil
omens.heretical_trace: Heretical traces detected in branch runes
omens.kebab_aligned: Kebab-case runes align with repository law
omens.penance_rite: Penance rite invoked — absolution hinges on your fix

fallback.sacred: The branch hums with quiet machine-blessed order
fallback.heretical: The branch trembles between order and chaos
fallback.forbidden: The branch reeks of unmerged despair

sacred.0: The Omnissiah smiles upon this branch. Merge shall be swift and CI green.
sacred.1: Your naming rite follows the sacred convention. Deploy with confidence.
sacred.2: This branch carries the incense of order. The repository approves.

heretical.0: The branch walks a narrow path. Review thrice before the merge ritual.
heretical.1: Suspicious sigils detected, yet not damned. Proceed with caution and tests.
heretical.2: The Machine Spirit squints at your branch. A refactor blessing may be required.

forbidden.0: Heresy! This branch name reeks of wip and despair. Rename before offering.
forbidden.1: The cogitators reject this sigil. No deploy shall pass until repentance.
forbidden.2: Forbidden nomenclature offends the Machine Spirit. Abandon this path.
